name: Capital One Platinum Secured Credit Card

other_benefits: Prequalify with no hard credit pull
Reports to all three major credit bureaus

sources.notes: NerdWallet review: solid choice for credit building, no annual fee
Capital One official page: 4.4/5 stars based on 14,179 reviews, 89% recommend
U.S. News review: pros include automatic credit line reviews, prequalify with no hard pull, $0 annual fee

notes: Secured credit card requiring a refundable deposit. No rewards earned. Best for those with poor/no credit who need to build credit history. Prequalification available (no hard pull). After responsible use, Capital One may upgrade to unsecured or refund deposit. High APR. No protections. 4.4/5 stars from 14,000+ reviews — customers praise ease of use and credit-building path.
